s_dragon.text: The dragon roared and flapped its wings, and the bird held on tight. But the dragon was too strong, and the bird was unable to escape. It was never able to soar again, and the dragon was very sad.

The dragon roared and got scared. It flew away from the little girl. She waved goodbye and went home.

The End.

The little girl was very happy. She knew her brave and flexible dragon was safe.

The dragon roared and flew towards the little girl. She jumped and landed on a branch. The dragon became angry and began to growl. The little girl started to cry. She was scared and tried to get away but she couldn't. The dragon was too strong and she was never seen again.
